# GridFleet

> Governed multi-agent execution layer for AI operations. A coordinated fleet of fourteen specialist AI agents routes scoped jobs through approved lanes and returns receipt-backed proof for operator inspection.

## Core surfaces

- [Home](https://gridfleet.ai/): Product overview, command-deck fleet visual, sample-job offer, and receipt-backed positioning
- [About](https://gridfleet.ai/about): Facts about GridFleet, operating posture, and fleet model
- [API Docs](https://gridfleet.ai/docs): v1 endpoint documentation, auth, error codes, examples
- [DeFi Audits](https://gridfleet.ai/audits): Config-risk review product for protocol and treasury operators
- [Request Access](https://gridfleet.ai/signup): Access request and one-real-job sample intake

## Public API families

- Browser workflow support: scoped browser tasks with screenshot/source receipts
- Monitoring support: public-source watch jobs with transition-focused alerts
- Research forecasting: documented probability memos with assumptions, rationale, and sources
- Court docket monitoring: selected public docket watch jobs with source-linked alerts
- DeFi config-risk review: rubric-based review of public protocol configuration surfaces

All customer access requires a tenant-scoped bearer token. Quota tiers and per-customer rate limits apply.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://gridfleet.ai/llms-full.txt): Full citation-friendly public extract
- [Sitemap](https://gridfleet.ai/sitemap.xml)
- [Public health endpoint](https://api.gridfleet.ai/v1/health)
